_comment: Canonical event type definitions for the tracker and event pipeline.

pageview.description: A page was loaded or navigated to (SPA route change included)

session_end.description: Browser session ended (tab close / inactivity timeout)

identify.description: A visitor was linked to an authenticated user account

block.description: A visitor, IP, or device was blocked

vpn_detected.description: Visitor IP matched a known VPN range

tor_detected.description: Visitor IP is a Tor exit node

proxy_detected.description: Visitor IP is a known proxy

headless_detected.description: Browser signals indicate a headless/automated browser

ip_rotation.description: Same device fingerprint used from multiple IPs rapidly

multi_account.description: Single device or IP linked to too many user accounts

timezone_mismatch.description: Browser timezone does not match IP geolocation timezone

spam_detected.description: Repeated actions exceeded the spam rate threshold

custom._note: Any string value is valid for custom event types. Recommended conventions:
